remaining_tasks.name: Manual deploy: upload dist.zip and run deploy.php

blockers.description: No FTP/SSH password available in this environment; SSH key was rejected by hostiman server.
blockers.workaround: User will upload dist.zip manually and call deploy.php.

human_actions_pending.action: Deploy dist.zip via deploy.php, then fill api/config.local.php on server: TG_PROXY (socks5/http proxy for api.telegram.org) and SMTP_* (smtp.mail.ru + app password for 89279611561@mail.ru)
human_actions_pending.context: send-form.php now sends via Telegram (proxy with direct fallback) and email (SMTP with mail() fallback) independently. Without new config values it works as before (direct TG + mail()).

decisions.decision: Exclude images/gallery from dist.zip for this deploy.
decisions.rationale: Gallery files are already on the server and were only optimized, not renamed. Including them would make the archive ~47 MB and slow FTP upload unnecessarily.

decisions.decision: Delete original JPG/PNG files that have WebP equivalents.
decisions.rationale: All code references use WebP versions; originals were unused and consumed ~50 MB in the repo.

decisions.decision: Resize gallery images to 1600px on the long edge and encode at WebP quality 75.
decisions.rationale: Reduced gallery from 87 MB to 36 MB with acceptable visual quality; large originals are not needed for web display.

next_action: Upload dist.zip (~1.9 MB, flat structure) to sunlife-photo.ru root and run https://sunlife-photo.ru/deploy.php?key=sunlife2025deploy. Then verify site. After that pick the next todo (recommended: todo-014 Thank-you/404, todo-011 Privacy policy, or todo-005 Analytics).
context_notes: 2026-07-19: contacts updated (telegram.me/roddomaphoto, 89279611561@mail.ru, Max links + icon), form submissions now also emailed via NOTIFY_EMAIL, desktop tooltips on social icons, Max added to form contact-method selectors, new pages /terms and /sitemap, public/sitemap.xml created, footer legal links moved to a single-line bottom strip (text-xs). dist.zip is now FLAT (no dist/ wrapper) per updated rule in DEPLOY-GUIDE.md. Build is clean, prerender covers 8 routes. Commits: e28e66e, 135317a (pushed). Footer change built but not yet committed.
